title: Essentia tube subclass parity batch
changes: Added EssentiaTubeSubtype mirror of original tube subclasses
Registered filter/restrict/oneway/buffer tube blocks using common Forge 1.19.2 block entity adapter
Persisted tc4Subtype, AspectFilter, choke, buffer, flow and original tube NBT keys
Added wand side toggle/choke adapter and redstone valve allowFlow behavior
forge_1192_adapters: One BlockEntity class stores subtype because Forge 1.19.2 registry/data-generation path is block-variant based; original class names are retained in subtype metadata
